iotanalytics.dataset.variable.CfnAbout: An instance of a variable to be passed to the `containerAction` execution. Each variable must have a name and a value given by one of `stringValue`, `datasetContentVersionValue`, or `outputFileUriValue`.

iotanalytics.dataset.variable.DatasetCon.Description: The value of the variable as a structure that specifies a dataset content version.

iotanalytics.dataset.variable.DoubleValu.Description: The value of the variable as a double (numeric).

iotanalytics.dataset.variable.OutputFile.Description: The value of the variable as a structure that specifies an output file URI.

iotanalytics.dataset.variable.StringValu.Description: The value of the variable as a string.
